title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 3, 2022
summary: November 3, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a lower rate from last week, of 10.25% , from the level on 10/27/2022 of 7.976 M km 2 to 8.887 M km 2 for this week; but still a pretty good increase over a week period. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Clima...

title: Elizabeth Schulze conducts the Anchorage Symphony Orchestra - Dvořák ”New World” Symphony #9
summary: An introduction to the new musical and artistic director of the Anchorage Symphony, Elizabeth Schulze. She presents the Dvořák "New World" Symphony #9 with insights into how and when it was composed. This complete performance was recorded live in Anchorage in October 2022 in the Atwood concert hall.
